title: Achoriphragma longicarpum

taxonomy: Achoriphragma longicarpum is classified under the family Asteraceae and belongs to the genus Achoriphragma. It is a flowering plant native to South America. The species is further categorized under the order Asterales. As a member of the daisy family, it shares similarities with other flowering plants in this family. Its classification is essential for understanding its evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
